metadata.description: PAI skill marketplace — coding, devtools, integrations, content, terminal, and more

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Custom agent composition from traits, voices, and personalities -- dynamic specialists with unique identities for parallel work

plugins.name: coding
plugins.description: Language-specific coding knowledge, architecture patterns, and framework guides — deep reference for writing production-quality code in specific stacks.

plugins.name: content
plugins.description: Content processing — web fetching, file conversion, HTML docs, transcription, and Mermaid diagrams

plugins.name: contentanalysis
plugins.description: Content-adaptive wisdom extraction from videos, podcasts, articles, and YouTube -- dynamic sections built from what the content actually contains

plugins.name: devtools
plugins.description: Developer tools — architecture review, debugging, dev workflow, design, code search, Swift, FluentBit, Python uv, VS Code, and security auditing

plugins.name: infrastructure
plugins.description: Home infrastructure management — Fritz!Box router and Synology NAS via pure Python CLIs

plugins.name: integrations
plugins.description: Service integrations — Google CLI tools, GitHub, Notion, Obsidian vault, and Zotero citations

plugins.name: investigation
plugins.description: OSINT and people-finding -- structured investigations, company intel, due diligence, and ethical people search across public records and social media

plugins.name: lifeos
plugins.description: Life management workflows — learning paths, trip planning, periodic reviews, and inbox processing with Obsidian vault integration

plugins.name: media
plugins.description: Visual and video content creation — illustrations, diagrams, infographics, header images, thumbnails, comics, and programmatic video via Remotion

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Comprehensive research and content extraction — quick/standard/extensive/deep modes with multi-agent parallel research, content retrieval, AI trends analysis, and 242+ Fabric patterns

plugins.name: scraping
plugins.description: Web scraping via progressive escalation (Bright Data proxy) and social media platform actors (Apify) — from simple URL fetch to CAPTCHA-solving proxy networks

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security assessment and intelligence — network reconnaissance, web app security testing, prompt injection testing, security news monitoring, and annual report analysis

plugins.name: skillsmeta
plugins.description: Skill lifecycle management — quality standards, cross-platform sync, and pi extension development

plugins.name: telos
plugins.description: Life OS and project analysis — goals, dependencies, beliefs, wisdom, books, movies, narrative points, interview extraction, McKinsey reports, and project dashboards

plugins.name: terminal
plugins.description: Terminal multiplexer control — tmux session management and cmux workspace automation

plugins.name: thinking
plugins.description: Multi-mode analytical and creative thinking — first principles decomposition, iterative depth analysis, creative brainstorming, multi-agent council debates, adversarial red teaming, world threat modeling, and scientific hypothesis testing

plugins.name: usmetrics
plugins.description: 68 US economic indicators from FRED, EIA, Treasury, BLS, Census APIs with trend analysis and cross-metric correlation

plugins.name: utilities
plugins.description: Developer utilities and tools -- CLI generation, skill scaffolding, agent delegation, system upgrades, evals, documents, parsing, audio editing, Fabric patterns, Cloudflare infrastructure, browser automation, meta-prompting, and aphorisms
